context: The apex of the Four Heavenly Kings era in Cantopop — Andy Lau, Jacky Cheung, Leon Lai, and Aaron Kwok dominated pop culture across Chinese-speaking Asia. Faye Wong emerged as a genre-defying force, bridging Cantopop and alternative aesthetics after her 'Chungking Express' breakthrough. Eason Chan launched what would become one of the longest careers in Cantopop.

tracks.title: Wo Zhen De Shou Shang Le (I'm Really Hurt)
Deng Ni Deng Dao Wo Xin Tong (Waiting Until My Heart Aches)
Jin Ye Ni Hui Bu Hui Lai (Will You Come Tonight)
